creator: rometravelers
caption:
Rome somehow makes every walk feel like a movie scene by @aktravells 🤍Send this to your favorite traveling partner! ❤️

💡 Rome has over 2,000 years of history layered into one city, which is why ancient ruins sit right beside modern cafés and apartments

transcription.text: Baby, baby, baby, I'm coming home to your tender seat, oh, then you're mine.
